creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 202707
Updated adult-domains.bin distinfo for cliqz

It seems adult-domains.bin got updated and some how this slipped under my nose despite doing the builds and checking it before submitting the patch.

I have updated the distinfo. The attached patch once applied should not cause checksum issues.

Also the latest version of cliqz should be 1.25.2, so make sure you update your ports tree before attempting a build.

Thank you for reporting the issue.
